name: migration: dry-run reports a mapping plan for all 58 pre-baked rules to their primary source files
command:
mkdir -p rubric && for i in $(seq 1 58); do printf '  - id: g-r-%03d
    name: r-%03d
    description: x
    detector: x
    provenance: [{source: google-tsguide, class: published-standard, section_id: x, url: https://x.com, fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z, content_hash: sha256:S}]
' "$i" "$i" >> /tmp/rules.yaml; done && { echo "rules:"; cat /tmp/rules.yaml; } > rubric/RUBRIC.yaml && rm /tmp/rules.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/migrate-rubric-to-source-folders.sh" --root "$PWD" --emit-tree "$PWD/tree" --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -E '58 rules' out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
